description: Course catalog where each course represents one capability at one specific proficiency level. A role has 5–6 capabilities; each capability has 5 levels (L1–L5), producing 5 courses per capability. Learners unlock each level course sequentially. The recommendation engine matches a learner's current level gap per capability to the corresponding level course.
design_rules: One course = one capability × one level (L1 through L5).
A role with 6 capabilities has up to 30 courses (6 × 5 levels).
Level 0 (no exposure) has no course — it is the entry state before L1.
Courses are completed sequentially per capability: L1 must be done before L2 is unlocked.
The unique constraint on (capability_id, level_no) guarantees exactly one course per capability per level.
Recommendation engine lookup: SELECT course_id FROM courses WHERE capability_id = :cap AND level_no = :target_level.

fields.name: course_id
fields.description: Unique surrogate identifier for the course

fields.name: course_code
fields.description: Human-readable course code following the convention {CAPABILITY_CODE}_L{level_no}. Matches the capability name at a specific level.

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: The primary role this course is designed for. A role owns 5–6 capabilities; this links the course back to that role context.

fields.name: capability_id
fields.description: The single capability this course develops. The capability name IS the course subject (e.g. 'Talent Acquisition', 'HR Operations & Compliance').

fields.name: capability_code
fields.description: Short code of the capability (e.g. TA, ELM, HRO). Denormalized for fast lookups.

fields.name: capability_name
fields.description: Full capability name, used as the course title subject (e.g. 'Talent Acquisition'). Denormalized from capabilities_master for display.

fields.name: level_no
fields.description: The proficiency level this course develops the learner toward. References level_scale. Level 0 is pre-course state; this field starts at 1.

fields.name: level_code
fields.description: Short level code (L1–L5). Denormalized from level_scale for display convenience.

fields.name: level_label
fields.description: Human-readable level label from level_scale (e.g. 'Basic awareness', 'Independently executes'). Denormalized for UI rendering.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Course title. Typically formatted as '{Capability Name} – {Level Label}' to make the learning goal immediately clear.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Course summary describing what the learner will be able to do upon completing this level of the capability.
fields.example: Develops foundational awareness of hiring stages, resume collection, and sourcing via job portals.

fields.name: observable_behavior
fields.description: What the learner must demonstrate to pass this course level. Sourced from capability_levels.observable_behavior for the matching capability + level.
fields.example: Understands hiring stages, assists with resume collection, and supports basic sourcing via job portals.

fields.name: example_outputs
fields.description: Concrete artifacts or deliverables expected as evidence at this level. Sourced from capability_levels.example_outputs.
fields.example: Collected resumes, interview scheduling support, hiring tracker updates.

fields.name: domain_id
fields.description: Domain classification for this course (e.g. Human Resources, Analytics).

fields.name: duration_minutes
fields.description: Estimated time to complete the course in minutes.

fields.name: xp_reward
fields.description: Experience points awarded on successful course completion.

fields.name: difficulty_level
fields.description: Human-readable difficulty label. Maps to level_no: L1=beginner, L2=foundation, L3=intermediate, L4=advanced, L5=expert.

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: Course thumbnail image URL for UI display.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this course is active in the catalog.

fields.name: is_published
fields.description: Whether this course is published and visible to learners.

fields.name: version_no
fields.description: Content version number. Increment on major content updates.

fields.name: course_status
fields.description: Publication lifecycle status of the course.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Record creation timestamp

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Last update timestamp

constraints.name: chk_level_no_range
constraints.description: Courses exist only for levels 1–5. Level 0 is the pre-entry state with no course.

constraints.name: chk_difficulty_level_mapping
constraints.description: Difficulty must match the level_no: L1=beginner, L2=foundation, L3=intermediate, L4=advanced, L5=expert.

unique_constraints.name: uq_course_capability_level
unique_constraints.description: Exactly one course per capability per level. The recommendation engine relies on this to return exactly one course per learner capability gap.

unique_constraints.name: uq_course_code
unique_constraints.description: Human-readable course code must be unique across all courses.

indexes.name: idx_courses_capability_level
indexes.description: Primary recommendation engine lookup: given a capability + target level, return exactly one course.

indexes.name: idx_courses_role_id
indexes.description: Get all courses belonging to a specific role.

indexes.name: idx_courses_is_active_published
indexes.description: Filter only active, published courses for learner-facing queries.

relationships.description: Each course belongs to a primary role. One role has 5–6 capabilities × 5 levels = up to 30 courses.
Each course targets exactly one capability. The capability name is the course subject.
Each course maps to a level in the global proficiency scale (L1–L5).
Each course is classified under a domain.
Learner enrollment and completion records per course.
Evidence artifacts submitted by learners for this course.

recommendation_logic.description: How the engine selects courses for a learner
recommendation_logic.query: SELECT course_id FROM courses WHERE capability_id = :cap_id AND level_no = :target_level AND is_active = true AND is_published = true LIMIT 1
recommendation_logic.gap_handling: If a learner is at level 0 for a capability required at level 3, the engine queues 3 courses in order: L1 → L2 → L3. Only L1 unlocks immediately. Each subsequent level unlocks after the prior course artifact is approved.

sample_records.title: Talent Acquisition – Basic Awareness
sample_records.description: Develops foundational awareness of hiring stages, resume collection, and sourcing via job portals.
sample_records.observable_behavior: Understands hiring stages, assists with resume collection, and supports basic sourcing via job portals.
sample_records.example_outputs: Collected resumes, interview scheduling support, hiring tracker updates.

sample_records.title: Talent Acquisition – Executes with Guidance
sample_records.description: Builds ability to source candidates independently for straightforward roles, screen basic resumes, and schedule interviews.
sample_records.observable_behavior: Sources candidates independently for straightforward roles, screens basic resumes, and schedules interviews.
sample_records.example_outputs: Shortlists for entry-level roles, sourcing logs, interview pipelines.
